title: Warehouse layouts
subtitle: Saved warehouse layouts will connect shelves, slots, and 3D pallet placement to inventory rows.

empty.title: No warehouse layouts yet
empty.description: Create a warehouse layout before connecting shelves and slots to inventory.

confirmDelete: Permanently delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

details.detailsDescription: These details identify the saved database-backed design.
details.name: Name

designer.title: Warehouse Designer
designer.designDescription: Design the warehouse here and save it directly to the database.

create.designDescription: Design the layout, then save to create the warehouse entry.
create.failedToCreate: Failed to create warehouse. Please try again.
create.desktopOnlyDescription: The 3D warehouse designer requires a larger screen. Please open this page on a desktop or tablet.

shelf.deleteShelfConfirm: Delete shelf {{code}}? This is only allowed when it has no assigned stock.
shelf.deleteSlotConfirm: Delete FACK {{compartment}}? This is only allowed when it has no assigned stock.

rack.notFound: Rack not found. Save the 3D design first, then reload.
rack.slotConfigDescription: Click a rack to configure its shelf levels and physical pallet slots.
rack.noRacks: Design the warehouse in the 3D editor and save it — racks will appear here for slot configuration.
rack.locationIdsAutoAssigned: Location IDs are assigned automatically from the placement of the inventory item attached to each slot.

slotMap.title: Slot map
slotMap.description: An occupied slot displays the attached item's existing placement location.
slotMap.noInventoryLinkedDescription: Link an inventory table or group from the Linked inventory tab to see items on shelves.
slotMap.noShelves: No shelves yet. Use the Shelves tab to add rack levels and slots.
slotMap.noItemsAtSlot: No inventory row is assigned to this warehouse slot.

slotAssign.title: Slot assignment
slotAssign.noAssignedInventory: This slot has no assigned inventory.
slotAssign.divideFack: Divide this slot into FACK cells
slotAssign.fackCellCount: Number of FACK cells (max different items)
slotAssign.fackError: Enter a FACK count of 1 or more.
slotAssign.searchPlaceholder: Search linked tables by item, article, manufacturer, or placement...

inventoryLinks.title: Linked inventory
inventoryLinks.description: Link inventory groups or tables to search and assign stock rows to slots in this warehouse.
inventoryLinks.noLinked: No inventory linked yet. Add a group or table to enable slot assignment.

qrScanner.title: Assign by QR
qrScanner.subtitle: Scan linked inventory item
qrScanner.cameraError: Camera could not be opened. Enter the QR value manually.
